title: Add `untag` sub-command
body:
Podman now supports untagging images via the `untag` sub-command for the
root and `image` commands. Testing and documentation has been added as
well.

Replaces: https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/4693 if agreed.

comments.body:
> The linter isn't happy.

Thanks for the hint, updating the PR now.
I think I have to re-add the `[flags]` indicator to make the integration tests happy.
Ping. Let's get this PR through.

> Ping. Let's get this PR through.

Rebased on top of the latest master branch and applied the review suggestion.
Note that we can ignore the rdoproject failures; they won't block merging for now.
